evidence.quote: Through genome-wide miRNA assays... it was found that miR-182 was upregulated in the AA more than in the CA population [68]
In a 2015-based study, the authors detected 18 and 22 unique miRNA in EA and AA, respectively [71]

issues.claim: Single step combining findings from Ref [68] and Ref [71]
issues.reason: Text describes these as two different studies (2014-based vs 2015-based) though combined in one step.

evidence.quote: Through genome-wide miRNA assays and repeated-measures analysis of variance, it was found that miR-182 was upregulated in the AA more than in the CA population, exhibiting momentous race-to-tumor interaction

Martin et al. through laser capture microdissection and genome-wide mRNA analyses for expression specific to breast cancer cells identified several secretory proteins which were overexpressed in the AAs than the European-Americans (EA)
the most differentially expressed genes were observed to be HLA-D members (HLA-DQA1 and HLA-DQB1)

genome-wide mRNA analyses... biological processes such as chemotaxis and ER-degradation pathways involved in tumor pathology could be functionally distinct in AAs and EAs. This observation was not just restricted to cell cycle regulators but also metastatic oncoproteins such as AMFR, PSPHL, and CRYBB2

evidence.quote: Single-cell sequencing is one such technique that allows biomarker discovery across cell types and also provides an idea regarding the heterogeneity between cell populations [74], which can be applied to tumor cells

issues.claim: chose to use Single-cell sequencing to perform cellular-level expression analysis
issues.reason: Text presents this as a future technique ('Into the future of secretome analysis') that 'can be applied', not as a completed study within the review's scope like previous steps.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Rephrase action to reflect future potential or recommendation (e.g., 'Proposed use of Single-cell sequencing') rather than executed experiment.
